boundary: Mappings certify only the stated formal kernel. Conditional and partial rows do not promote the full prose statement to a Lean theorem.

entries.note: Free energy and viability definitions.
Requires the named second-law comparison and fixed-point calibration.
The closed balance law is structure data, not a global Lean axiom.
Persistence remains an explicit bridge law.
Proves the quotient threshold form only for positive minimum coupling.
Matrix and asymptotic ratio.
Normalization and equal calibration uniquely select unit weights.
Arithmetic spectral kernel; commutator interpretation is not certified.
Balanced Fibonacci memory ratio prediction.
Integer two-support lower bound and elementary diagonal ratio.
Complete finite-support kernel: lower and cardinality upper bounds, finite p>1 and Linfinity equality characterizations, and the elementary diagonal values.
Algebraic separation of phi and sqrt(2).
Arithmetic separation kernel only; the resonance-vs-fracture mechanism reading stays authored prose.
The norm and memory spectra are explicit independent product coordinates; sqrt(2) and phi coexist without identification.
Transition-level diagnostic classification with independently varying norm and memory axes; not an essential identity of a manifold or agent.
Typed product coordinates and their independence, not a universal manifold semantics.
Weighted companion matrix and positive eigenpair.
Spectral rate regimes only; ethical interpretation remains authored prose.
Covenant tuple as data with sign-carrying stability; the MAD dual is an involution that flips stability but not coupling strength.
The viability domain is definitionally the positive-free-energy region.
MAP as positive-limit condition on the joint surplus sequence; membrane semantics not certified.
Convergence kernel only: positive limit forces joint indefinite viability; the coupling-threshold hypothesis enters via the contraction instance.
Scalar instance: contractive coupled ratio with positive carrying level yields MAP.
Linear exchange model: the sign of stability decides viability vs collapse, and MAD is the exact polarity reflection of MAP.
Assurance-game witness: cooperation and the trap are both Nash, cooperation payoff-dominant; general existence not proved.
Threshold-conversion kernel only; the phase-transition and fixed-point reading is not certified.
Typed transition diagnostics certify axis integrability, Euclidean fracture, and support collapse, including a concrete loss-of-distribution witness.
Finite-support typed kernel assembling all norm regimes, equality cases, support collapse, diagonal decoherence, and the distinct memory resonance channel.
Exact finite-positive-p and Linfinity formulas, special values, monotonicity in positive finite p, and divergence of Linfinity torsion along unbounded support.
The logarithmic diagnostic is 2-1/p for finite p on support at least two, with the support-one convention and p=1,2,infinity values certified.
Finite admissible-path kernel with symbolic candidates explicitly included in geometric candidates; proves the exact minimum and representability criteria.
For finite path families, decoherence is the nonnegative excess symbolic minimum, vanishing exactly when a symbolic geodesic exists; the diagonal gap is exact.
Phi is the unique positive balanced-recursion root in the memory coordinate and is proved distinct from the Euclidean norm ratio.
Balanced memory ratios converge to the unique phi coordinate, while sqrt(2) remains a distinct metric-fracture coordinate.

Given the stated observer-resolved linear equivalence and diagonal evolution law, four-channel reconstruction, uniqueness, and invariance are proved. Existence of such a decomposition is not asserted universally.
Drift/reflection stabilization cancels only its budget channel. Zero energy derivative additionally requires external closure; a compiled countermodel refutes conservation from balance alone.
Represented as explicit MetabolicPersistenceLaw data, not a Lean axiom or a definitional implication.
Positive free-energy persistence characterizes life only under a supplied LifeLaw; agreement alone does not manufacture that bridge.
The corollary composes LifeLaw and MetabolicPersistenceLaw explicitly.
‖R_AB‖ is consumed only as a free scalar parameter inside the resilience/coupling threshold laws; the tensor/operator-norm structure itself is not modeled.
models the step-wise nondecreasing-union law as a hypothesis field and proves it chains over arbitrary m≤n; does not derive the law from MAP membership itself.
proves resilience-floor propagation through the derived covenant given the stated nonneg-loss hypothesis, rather than deriving Δ_trans≥0 itself.
the resilience>1 threshold is exactly the stated iff-form, given the denominator positive.

captures the combinatorial min-threshold-propagation step (min ρ>1 ⟹ every edge ρ>1); does not derive the asymptotic liminf F_s>0 conclusion, which needs an actual dynamical recursion not supplied by the anchor.
the selective-advantage shape is captured by finite weighted dominance and the invasion threshold; the replicator-dynamics time-derivative itself is not modeled.
the tensor's scalar spectral-radius reading feeds coupling_stability_gt_one_iff as the free parameter normR; the operator itself is not constructed.
same scalar parameter as above; the max-|eigenvalue| definition of the spectral radius is not itself computed.
the long-horizon chaining content is proved; the probability-1 limit statement is not (no probability space is modeled).
min(a,b) reading as conjunction is exactly lt_min_iff, applied to the criterion's two per-membrane ratios.
Λ_AB is defined exactly as couplingStability and its threshold/boundary behavior is proved.
the Λ_AB=1 boundary is exactly the stated iff-form.

proves the MAP log-bound and MAD linear-bound are eventually mutually exclusive (given the MAD rate exceeds the MAP rate); does not cover the decoupling √n case or derive the bounds from an actual KL-divergence trajectory.
the ±1/0 adjacency-matrix case split is an exhaustive, pairwise-exclusive trichotomy on (Λ,Ω), proved directly.
strategies are consumed abstractly as an index type / real payoff values inside the dominance and invasion lemmas, not as the (reflect,transfer,coop-coefficient) tuple itself.
Σ_MAP is read as the positive-weight support set in the finite weighted-dominance lemma.
Φ is modeled abstractly as real-valued payoff functions a,b,c,d / w; the expectation-over-population definition itself is not constructed from F_s.
constructs an explicit ε0>0 witnessing the existential in the ESS definition, for the two-point mixture case.
instantiates directly: pointwise strict dominance on positive-weight population members gives strict weighted-average dominance.
same finite-dominance mechanism; the specific (1-ε)δ+εδ mixture reading is captured by ess_invasion_threshold instead, not jointly here.

stability and non-invasibility conditions are covered by ess_invasion_threshold; viability expansion is covered qualitatively by viability_union_mono_chain; the three are not composed into one theorem.
min-threshold-propagation mechanism reused; the margin δ>0 above 1 is not separately modeled (min>1+δ>1 trivially satisfies the >1 hypothesis).
proves existence of a local ε0-neighbourhood of invasion resistance; the anchor's strong-ESS claim is stability for ALL ε∈(0,1), which this does not establish.
ess_invasion_threshold's ε0 is a witness lower bound for the sup defining β; the supremum itself is not constructed.
same qualitative threshold-existence shape; the specific bound β≥1-‖d0‖/‖d‖ is not matched or derived.
F_proc's admissibility role is mirrored by the MetabolicBudget structure's cost law; the E_cost/E_eff/C_hint decomposition itself is not modeled.
a strictly positive cost overrun above the sustainable maximum drives the accumulated deficit negative in finite time (Archimedean argument), matching the anchor's finite-time exit claim.
MC is treated as an opaque nonnegative real parameter; its two alternative characterizations (time-average free energy vs max sustainable drift norm) are not modeled or shown equivalent.
the bound B=f(MC) with f nondecreasing is not modeled as a function; instead the geometric-growth consequence for recursion depth is proved directly from a budget hypothesis c0·k^n≤B.
n ≤ logb k (B/c0) is proved directly via Real.log monotonicity from the geometric-cost hypothesis.
the {F_proc<θ_proc} viability-set reading is mirrored by the admissible-complexity bound; the operator space Op(M) itself is not constructed.
C, S, E_maint are represented as the structure's C, S, and the derived product form, packaged with the nonnegativity/positivity side-conditions as named fields (no axioms).
C·S≤α·MC rearranges directly to C≤α·MC/S given S>0.
the admissible-complexity bound α·MC/S is proved monotone nondecreasing in MC, for fixed α≥0,S>0.

confirms the balanced closure matrix sits on the real-spectrum side of the discriminant trichotomy (consistent with φ being its real dominant eigenvalue, per Book5.closureMatrix_eigen_gold/gold_unique_positive_root); the subcritical/supercritical renormalization narrative is not modeled.
the discriminant-based real/complex spectral split underlying MAD vs MAP/MAS is proved generically; the specific MAP-vs-MAS distinction (which real eigendirection is dominant) is not captured.
proves the MAD (complex, disc<0) vs non-MAD (real, disc≥0) split and exhibits the closure matrix concretely on the real/MAP side; does not separate MAP from MAS within the real branch.
only the constant-rescaled-Fibonacci case of the ratio limit is proved; the anchor's general two-term holonomy/curvature recurrence (arbitrary balanced-closure initial data) is not derived.
F_bal is bounded below by F0 and attains F0 exactly at r=φ, for r,α>0.

the irrational-scaling content of a diagonal transition is captured via the reused √2 compression ratio (and Book5.sqrt2_first_fracture); the decomposability characterization itself is not formalized.
only the p=1 vs p=2 norm-domination case is proved concretely; the general ℓp class I_p for arbitrary p is not constructed.
κ_2(v)=‖v‖1/‖v‖2-1 ≥ 0 is proved for all finite real vectors.
all three predicted ratios R1=1, R2=√2, R∞=support-size are proved (R∞ via the equal-magnitude ℓ1 formula).
only the scalar factor κ_2(v) is proved nonnegative; the operator v ↦ κ_p(v)·v and its spectrum are not constructed.
Stationary iff critical point of F_proc for the descent step; the minimizer/critical gap stays open.
SRMF convergence to a fixed point (contraction-Banach); the Wasserstein O(1/t) rate stays open.
The recursive reflective flow converges to a unique stable fixed point.
Operators evolve to and rest at the unique viable fixed point.
Metabolic capacity non-decreasing in energy reserves.
Viability antitone in spectral radius: minimizing rho maximizes viability.
